emails.subject: Monday California call
emails.body: Monday California call Jeff--I must not be on the e mail distribution list for the Monday California call. COuld you please send me info so that if I am not already on another call (yes, I know, I am a pretty popular gal) I can jump on yours. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: Monday California call
emails.body: Re: Monday California call 8:30 AM PDT, every monday. call-in 800.998.2462 code 4912753 be great if you could join regularly. Best, Jeff
